name: @statisticsnorway/design-css
description: Styles and theme for SSB Designsystem
author: Statistics Norway

scripts.build: pnpm clean && postcss "src/**/*.css" --base src --dir dist/src && postcss "theme/*.css" --dir dist/theme && mkdir -p dist/src/fonts && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/src/fonts
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/src/fonts && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/src/fonts && postcss "theme/*.css" --dir dist/theme && postcss "src/**/*.css" --base src --dir dist/src --watch
